question: What is the rack-level DC power requirement of the NVIDIA GB200 NVL72?
findings: The GB200 NVL72 rack uses three 1U 33 kW power shelves per half-rack section, with this configuration repeated twice in the rack, yielding six 33 kW power shelves total.

The GB200 NVL72 is a fully liquid-cooled rack-scale design housing 36 NVIDIA Grace CPUs, 72 NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs, up to 17 TB of LPDDR5X memory, and 5th Gen NVLink technology delivering 130 TB/s GPU communication bandwidth.
The GB200 NVL72 compute tray (GIGABYTE XN14-CB0-LA01) is a 1U liquid-cooled server node housing 2 Grace CPUs and 4 Blackwell GPUs, cooled via 8x 40x40x56mm fans and 2 superchip cold plate loops.
The GB200 NVL72 rack contains 10 compute trays and 9 NVLink Switch Trays; each NVLink Switch Tray provides 144 NVLink ports and 5th-generation NVLink with 1.8 TB/s GPU-GPU interconnect.
The source documents do not state an explicit total rack-level DC power figure for the GB200 NVL72; only the individual power shelf rating of 33 kW per shelf is provided.

research_gaps.description: No UPS or battery backup requirements found.
